prompt: Create a full-body front-facing 2D fashion doll / anime-inspired dress-up character on a vertical 2:3 canvas, standing in a glossy pastel candy stage. The character is a cute young female AI doll with a deliberately blank smooth face with no eyes, nose, or mouth, light skin, and warm caramel brown hair styled into exactly two high curled twin tails with ringlet curls and small bangs mostly hidden by accessories. She wears an elaborate sweet lolita idol outfit in mint green, cream, pink, yellow, and turquoise: a floral candy headband with many tiny bows, pearls, beads, flowers, and pastel dessert charms; a cream puff-sleeve blouse with pink edging; one large yellow bow at the chest with a turquoise gem center; a mint corset bodice with brown trim and pink crisscross lacing; a short layered cupcake skirt with exactly four visible ruffle tiers in cream, pink, yellow, and lace-trimmed pastel layers, decorated with tiny sprinkles, bows, hearts, and dessert ornaments; white thigh-high lace stockings with pink ribbon lacing; and pink platform Mary Jane heels with heart decorations and pastel straps. Count the main symmetrical elements clearly: 2 curled twin tails, 2 puff sleeves, 1 chest bow, 1 corset, 4 skirt ruffle tiers, 2 thigh-high stockings, 2 pink platform shoes, 2 large spiral candy-cane columns in the background, and 2 round pink heart medallions behind her. Pose her standing gracefully with one leg crossed forward, arms lowered slightly outward, fingers relaxed, like a collectible dress-up doll. Background: a high-key pastel confectionery set with a mint-and-cream checkerboard tiled wall, twisted mint-yellow candy columns forming an arch, pink heart disks on both sides, glossy pale pink floor, soft studio lighting, dreamy overexposed highlights, clean kawaii aesthetic, highly detailed fabric textures, lace, ribbons, beads, plastic-doll smoothness, sharp full-body composition. Use polished Japanese 2D anime doll fashion illustration with realistic costume detail. Avoid text, logos, watermark, extra characters, and facial features.
